thread_title: V2.3.1 「朵尔·灵性重生」简约幻衣，可在邀请活动中获取┊Get Basic Skin "Doll: Gnostic Reshape" from the New Invitation Event!
V2.3.1 「朵尔·灵性重生」简约幻衣，可在邀请活动中获取┊Get Basic Skin "Doll: Gnostic Reshape" from the New Invitation Event!

content:
✍**已知：**
守密人正与唤醒体们在伦蒂尼恩海边度假。此时，几十位唤醒体纷纷向你发出邀请：
“摆躺椅、沏茶、还有涂防晒霜……我还有好多事情要你帮忙呢。”
“冰棒好凉！要不要和我来一场热烈的游戏呢？”
为淑女准备下午茶、听教授科普海洋知识、来一场海滩心理疗愈、组织海滩烧烤、一起晒日光浴……呼——

❓️**请问：**
守密人该如何凭一己之力，同时安排好几十位唤醒体的邀请？

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

✍**Here's the situation:**
You're on vacation with the Awakeners by the seaside of Londinium. At this moment, dozens of Awakeners need to spend time with you...
"I need you to set up my lounge chair, prepare my tea, and do be meticulous with the sunscreen... I've got a LOT for you to do."
"Aww, my popsicle is sooo cold! Wanna have a super hot game with me?"
Preparing afternoon tea for a certain young lady, listening to your professor's lecture on marine science, having a psychological conseling session by the beach, organizing a barbecue party, sunbathing with everyone else… 

❓️**Now, here's the question...**
How do you possibly manage your time to make everyone happy?
